feedback.text: Dear Sir, The fact that a company I have bought from can choose to destroy a product afterwards is not correct. After all, that is something I have paid for. It goes without saying that the company should not be forced to spend money indefinitely to keep a product functional, but there are alternatives such as open source, and if not to have an end of life plan in all cases. Then, before buying a digital product, I know how it will be managed.
